description:
## Goal

Move the refresh loop supervisor out of `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` into a dedicated `src/fetcher/refresh_supervisor.cr`. This includes the `State` inner class and all the orchestration helpers that drive the per-cycle loop. After this ticket, `refresh_loop.cr` should hold only the public API.

## Source: src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr (current location)

Move:
- `private class State` (lines ~312-360) — the supervisor's lifecycle state
- `check_stuck_recovery(stuck_threshold)` (~lines 370-388)
- `check_semaphore_health` (~lines 390-405)
- `reload_config_if_changed(config_path, state)` (~lines 407-428)
- `run_initial_refresh(state, cache, db_service)` (~lines 430-460)
- `run_timed_refresh(state, cache, db_service)` (~lines 462-525)
- `sleep_between_cycles(state)` (~lines 527-535)
- `log_heartbeat(state)` (~lines 537-557)
- `def self.start(config_path, cache, db_service)` (~lines 651-720)

## Target: src/fetcher/refresh_supervisor.cr

Design the supervisor as a class that takes its dependencies (config_path, cache, db_service, semaphore) in the constructor and exposes a `run` method. Move `State` to either the top of the new file or its own small class.

```crystal
module RefreshLoop::Supervisor
  def self.start(config_path, cache, db_service, semaphore) : Nil
    # current `self.start` body
  end

  # Or, if converted to a class:
  # class RefreshLoop::Supervisor
  #   def initialize(@config_path, @cache, @db_service, @semaphore)
  #   def run : Nil
  #   def run_one_cycle(state) : Nil
  # end
end
```

## Acceptance

- `src/fetcher/refresh_supervisor.cr` exists with the moved code.
- `State` is no longer nested inside `RefreshLoop` module at the original location; it's either at the top of `refresh_supervisor.cr` or in its own file.
- `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` no longer contains these helpers, but still exposes `def self.start` as a thin delegate (or callers are updated to call `RefreshLoop::Supervisor.start` directly).
- `just nix-build` succeeds.
- `nix develop . --command crystal spec` passes.

## Notes

- The 70-line `start` method has deeply nested `if state.first_run? ... reload_config_if_changed ... run_timed_refresh ... log_heartbeat` logic. Consider breaking it into named steps (`run_first_cycle`, `run_regular_cycle`, `handle_stuck_state`) for readability. Keep it optional — extraction is the priority; restructuring is a follow-up if it complicates the diff.
- `start_health_reporter` is moved in a separate ticket (az6.4) and called from `Supervisor.start` after spawning the supervisor loop.
- This ticket depends on `quickhea-az6.1` (semaphore pool) — the supervisor needs to take the `SemaphorePool` instance as a parameter.
title: Extract refresh supervisor (State + orchestration) into src/fetcher/refresh_supervisor.cr
